faq.question: What does Likith do?
faq.answer: Likith Naidu Anumamkonda is an AI-ML Architect and Founder of SAKRA VISION. He architectures complete digital ecosystems, specializing in AI agents, custom ML models, and full-stack systems built with Python and Node.js.

faq.question: Is Likith an AI-ML architect?
faq.answer: Yes. Likith is a specialized AI-ML architect with deep expertise in developing ML models, AI Agents, and autonomous automation. He builds intelligent systems from the ground up.

faq.question: What is RESOLVIT?
faq.answer: RESOLVIT is Likith's flagship civic-tech platform—an AI-powered operations system designed for citizens, NGOs, and public authorities. It transforms community signals and complaints into structured, actionable workflows through AI clustering, real-time tracking, and geo-intelligence mapping.

faq.question: Can Likith build AI agents and ML models?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Likith develops sophisticated AI Agents and custom ML models tailored to specific technical requirements. He handles everything from algorithm design to production deployment.

faq.question: Does Likith do full-stack in Python or Node.js?
faq.answer: Likith is a strong full-stack developer in both Python (FastAPI/Flask) and Node.js environments. He manages both backend logic and premium frontend architectures.

faq.question: Does Likith handle APIs and Metadata?
faq.answer: Yes. Likith is an API controller and metadata expert. He designs robust API architectures, handles end-to-end integration, and builds structured metadata systems for web SEO and AI readability.

faq.question: Does Likith handle domains and Google Console?
faq.answer: Yes. Likith is a domain controller and infrastructure setup specialist. He manages domain configuration, server setup, and Google Search Console/Google Console configuration for production systems.

faq.question: Can Likith do deployment?
faq.answer: Likith handles the entire deployment workflow across both frontend and backend platforms. He manages cloud databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB) and ensures production-grade delivery of every product.

faq.question: What is Likith's role in the Solution Challenge 2026?
faq.answer: Likith is the founder and leader of Team SΛKRΛ in the GDG Solution Challenge 2026. He led the team in architecting RESOLVIT, an AI-powered civic operations platform, demonstrating high-level engineering leadership and innovation under the Google 'Build with AI' initiative.
